'''Ifmix VI''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. It was known for its terrible windstorms, tornadoes, and [[Squalris]] merchants. It was located near the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]].

{{Planet-stub}}
